battle.gameOver: 💀 GAME OVER: Pskov has fallen to the Teutonic Order!
battle.defenseVictory: 🛡️ VICTORY! {{region}} successfully defended! ({{chance}}% chance, Strength: {{pskovStrength}} vs {{orderStrength}})
battle.attackVictory: ⚔️ VICTORY! {{region}} recaptured from the Order! ({{chance}}% chance, Strength: {{pskovStrength}} vs {{orderStrength}})
battle.attackDefeat: 💀 DEFEAT! Attack on {{region}} failed! ({{chance}}% chance, Strength: {{pskovStrength}} vs {{orderStrength}})
battle.defenseFailed: 💀 DEFEAT! {{region}} lost to the Order! ({{chance}}% chance, Strength: {{pskovStrength}} vs {{orderStrength}})
battle.surrendered: {{region}} surrendered to the Order! All buildings destroyed.
battle.noValidTarget: The Teutonic Order could not find a valid target to attack.
battle.compensationFailed: Compensation demand failed! Merchants weakened for 3 turns.
battle.tradeDisrupted: Trade routes disrupted! Merchants lose 50% strength for 3 turns.
battle.noblesPunished: Nobles punished for corruption! -2○ and -15 strength for 3 turns.
battle.uprising: UPRISING! All factions lose 50% strength. Buildings destroyed: {{buildings}}
battle.corruptionIgnored: Corruption ignored. The people grumble but no uprising occurs.
battle.embassyRefused: Embassy refused! Grand Prince is insulted. Strength -15 and income -50% for 5 turns.
battle.embassyLuxurious: Embassy received luxuriously! +10 strength for 3 turns.
battle.relicsChurchBuilt: Church built for holy relics! +5 strength for 3 turns.
battle.relicsDeception: Relics declared false! Religious cynicism spreads. -5 strength for 3 turns.
battle.izhorianAccepted: Izhorians accepted into service! +5 strength for 6 turns.
battle.izhorianRobbed: Izhorians robbed! They become hostile. -5 strength for 6 turns.
battle.droughtFamine: Famine strikes! Commoners lose 50% strength for 3 turns.
battle.fireNoBuildings: Fire breaks out in {{region}}, but there are no buildings to burn.
battle.cityFireNoBuildings: Fire breaks out in Pskov, but there are no buildings to burn.
battle.heresy: Heretical ideas spread! All factions lose 10 strength for 2 turns.
battle.plagueContained: Plague partially contained! All factions lose 5 strength for 2 turns.
battle.plagueSpread: Plague spreads unchecked! All factions lose 25 strength for 2 turns.
battle.squirrelsSkinned: Squirrels skinned for magnificent furs! +25% income but commoners are furious. -12 strength for 3 turns.
battle.squirrelsBefriended: Giant squirrels welcomed! They help find forest paths and bring nuts. -25% income but +5 strength for 3 turns.

howToPlay.title: How to Play
howToPlay.goal1: Survive 20 turns defending the Pskov Republic from the Teutonic Order
howToPlay.goal2: If Pskov (the capital) falls, you lose immediately
howToPlay.goal3: After 20 turns, victory points are tallied from money, buildings, equipment, and military strength
howToPlay.phase1: Resources — collect income from your territories and buildings
howToPlay.phase2: Construction — build one improvement (2 coins) or buy equipment (1 coin)
howToPlay.phase3: Events — a random event card is drawn; vote on how to respond
howToPlay.phase4: City Assembly (Veche) — vote to attack Order territories or build fortresses (6 coins shared)
howToPlay.action1: Build to earn more income each turn and score points at the end
howToPlay.action2: Vote on events — some cost money, some are free, all have consequences
howToPlay.action3: Fund defense when the Order attacks, or risk losing territory
howToPlay.action4: Coordinate attacks and fortress-building with the other factions in the Veche
howToPlay.faction1: Nobles — strongest military (40 str), build manors and monasteries across all regions
howToPlay.faction2: Merchants — wealthiest (15 str), build mansions and churches in Pskov only (up to 7 each), send overseas expeditions
howToPlay.faction3: Commoners — the people (25 str), build huts and village churches across all regions

discussion.title: Council Discussion
discussion.empty: AI council members will share their thoughts during events.
